  <title>Release notes from aeon</title>

  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/580387696/v1.4.0</id>
    <updated>2026-03-23T21:35:44Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/aeon-toolkit/aeon/releases/tag/v1.4.0"/>
    <title>aeon v1.4.0</title>
    <content type="html"><p>See our <a href="https://www.aeon-toolkit.org/en/stable/changelog.html" rel="nofollow">changelog</a> to view all changes for this release.</p>
<h2>Highlights</h2>
<ul>
<li>New native implementations of estimators, including: ROCKAD anomaly detector; K-Shape clusterer; TS-QUAD configuration for in ElasticEnsemble classifier; ETS/AutoETS and DeepARF forecasters; and STL, MSTL and LOWESS transformers</li>
<li>Most classification and regression data is now loaded from Zenodo, including from the Multiverse, a relaunched multivariate classification archive</li>
<li>Deprecate Python 3.10 and allow Python 3.14, along with altering version bounds for many core derpendencies</li>
<li>Plenty of bug fixes and deprecation actions</li>
</ul>
<h2>New Contributors</h2>
<ul>
